name: Changchun Yidong Clutch CO.,LTD
summary: Changchun Yidong Clutch CO.,LTD engages in the development, production, and sales of automobile clutches in China and internationally. Its products include clutches, including driven desk and cover assembly products; and hydraulic lifting products, such as hydraulic locks and cylinders, and manual and electric pumps. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Changchun, China.
